/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared  -o pfaffian_cuda.so CMakeFiles/pfaffian_cuda.dir/bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pfaffian_cuda.dir/pfaffian.cu.o   -L/usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-13.1/lib64:/usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib /usr/local/cuda-13.1/lib64/libcublas.so /usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcublasLt.so /usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libculibos.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
